rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE FINLEY VS. MITCHELL HUANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 7, 2019, Line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTS COURTNEY DAVIS, PARK NORTH REAL ESTATE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for cross-complainant to assert non-duplicative causes of action against the moving cross-defendants and to allege facts supporting each element of each cause of action asserted and facts regarding cross-defendant's tortious wrongdoing (basis for indemnity). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 7, 2019, Line 2. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to May 9, 2019 per March 6, 2019 ex-parte order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 7, 2019, Line 3. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication. DENIED. Multiple triable issues of material facts, e.g. notice to lenders, attempts to pay within 10 days, etc. The Court does not rule on Plaintiff's objections to Defendant's evidence. Objections are not in the proper format per CRC 3.1354. =(501/CFH)
